title: Crisis PR Statement
description: Drafting the statement when every minute the silence lasts makes the story worse.
summary_pt_br: Declaração de crise: 1ª frase reconhece, 2ª nomeia ação, 3ª se compromete com transparência. Sem voz passiva.

scenes.subtitle_en: Drafting the statement when every minute the silence lasts makes the story worse.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Declaração de crise: 1ª frase reconhece, 2ª nomeia ação, 3ª se compromete com transparência. Sem voz passiva.

scenes.text_en: Drafting the statement when every minute the silence lasts makes the story worse. Focus: crisis pr statement. We became aware of the incident at 3:14 AM and acted within the hour.
scenes.text_pt: Declaração de crise: 1ª frase reconhece, 2ª nomeia ação, 3ª se compromete com transparência. Sem voz passiva. Foco: crisis pr statement. Soubemos do incidente às 3h14 e agimos em uma hora.

scenes.title: Crisis PR Statement
scenes.body_en: Crisis statement rules: FIRST SENTENCE acknowledges without minimizing. SECOND SENTENCE names the concrete action. THIRD SENTENCE commits to transparency. Never use passive voice.
scenes.body_pt: Declaração de crise: 1ª frase reconhece, 2ª nomeia ação, 3ª se compromete com transparência. Sem voz passiva.

examples.en: We became aware of the incident at 3:14 AM and acted within the hour.
examples.pt: Soubemos do incidente às 3h14 e agimos em uma hora.

examples.en: Every affected customer will receive a personal message by Friday.
examples.pt: Toda pessoa afetada receberá mensagem pessoal até sexta.

examples.en: We will publish a full post-mortem within seven days, no redactions.
examples.pt: Publicaremos post-mortem completo em 7 dias, sem redação.

exercise.question: Complete: "We became aware of the ___ at 3:14 AM and acted within the hour."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "We became aware of the incident at 3:14 AM and acted within the hour."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Soubemos do incidente às 3h14 e agimos em uma hora.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Every affected customer will receive a personal message by Friday.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Every affected customer will receive a personal message by Friday."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Toda pessoa afetada receberá mensagem pessoal até sexta.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Crisis PR Statement — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre crisis pr statement. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Joca — breach just happened. First sentence?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: We became aware at 3:14 and acted within the hour.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Every affected customer gets a personal message by Friday.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Full post-mortem within seven days, no redactions.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: One thing you must never do?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Crisis well-handled builds more trust than smooth quarters.

scenes.title: The 4 AM draft
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe four rules of the crisis statement. Use at least three crisis terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At four in the morning, Joca and three directors sat around a kitchen table drafting a statement that would leave at six.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: We became aware of the incident at 3:14 AM and acted within the hour — that's the first sentence, unambiguously.

paragraphs.speaker: Director
paragraphs.en: Second sentence names the concrete action — every affected customer receives a personal message by Friday, without exception.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: Third sentence commits to transparency — full post-mortem within seven days, published in full with no redactions.

paragraphs.speaker: Director
paragraphs.en: We delete every passive verb from the draft — 'an error occurred' is the sentence that finished careers.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Crisis statements, Joca understood, are written in the language of accountability — or they are not written at all.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Crisis PR Statement". Drafting the statement when every minute the silence lasts makes the story worse. We became aware of the incident at 3:14 AM and acted within the hour. Every affected customer will receive a personal message by Friday. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Crisis PR Statement". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Crisis PR Statement".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Crisis PR Statement".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
